query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total,
       SUM(CASE WHEN tipo = 'Fijo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as fijo_count,
       SUM(CASE WHEN tipo = 'Bonificación' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as bonificacion_count,
       SUM(CASE WHEN tipo = 'Fijo' AND costo_por_unidad = '350.00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as fijo_with_cost,
       SUM(CASE WHEN tipo = 'Bonificación' AND costo_por_unidad = '0.00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as bonif_with_zero
FROM anuncios 
WHERE cliente = 'OPIOIDES';

       SUM(CASE WHEN tipo = 'Fijo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as fijo_count,
       SUM(CASE WHEN tipo = 'Bonificación' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as bonificacion_count,
       SUM(CASE WHEN tipo = 'Fijo' AND costo_por_unidad = '350.00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as fijo_with_cost,
       SUM(CASE WHEN tipo = 'Bonificación' AND costo_por_unidad = '0.00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as bonif_with_zero
FROM anuncios 
WHERE cliente = 'OPIOIDES';
